name: Clam Chowder
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain liquid from the minced clams over the vegetables and, if necessary, add enough water to just cover the vegetables.
2. Simmer until the vegetables are tender.
3. Sauté the bacon and add it to the vegetables.
4. Add the clams; then add the white sauce.
5. To make the basic white sauce:
a. Heat oil in a heavy skillet.
b. Add flour and salt, stirring quickly until smooth.
c. Remove from heat and add milk at once, stirring constantly to eliminate any lumps. Use a whisk if needed.
d. Return to heat. As the sauce begins to come to a boil, it will thicken.
e. Remove from heat when it reaches the desired consistency.
